stories.title: Homepage visible copy must not contain broken Korean text
stories.prompt: Audit the homepage for visible Korean copy integrity. Look for mojibake, broken labels, malformed button text, and visible placeholder text that is not readable Korean. Focus on the search area, focus-guide cards, chart labels, button labels, and section headers.

stories.title: Search controls should be singular and usable
stories.prompt: Audit the homepage search controls. Verify there is exactly one primary 조회 action in the search bar, the button is visible, Enter key search still works, and suffix selection does not create duplicate or confusing controls.
acceptance: Calls out any duplicate or missing 조회 button issue

stories.title: RSI and MACD must render when toggled
stories.prompt: Audit chart indicator visibility. Verify that RSI and MACD can actually appear in the price-flow area when toggled, that hidden containers do not prevent rendering, and that chart defaults match the intended UX.
acceptance: Mentions actual render blockers if found

stories.title: EMA/SMA and Bollinger defaults must match intended off state
stories.prompt: Audit default indicator state. Confirm whether EMA/SMA and Bollinger Bands are off by default in both UI controls and initial chart visibility state. Flag any mismatch between checkbox defaults and chart rendering defaults.
acceptance: States whether UI and chart state are aligned

stories.title: Public pages and stock APIs should still respond with expected status
stories.prompt: Audit the public surface. Verify that /, /about, /contact, /privacy respond, /api/stock/technical still works, the deprecated signal-date endpoint remains 410, and historical-snapshot out-of-range requests still return 404 NO_DATA_IN_RANGE rather than 500.
